# FeatureAlignment { #natural_features.FeatureAlignment }

```python
FeatureAlignment(
    source_name,
    source,
    source_kind,
    source_schema,
    source_onset_s,
    source_offset_s,
    target,
    mapping,
    policy='overlap',
    source_reference=STIMULUS_CLOCK,
    target_reference=STIMULUS_CLOCK,
    mapped_onset_s=None,
    mapped_offset_s=None,
)
```

Alignment of one temporal feature output to a target timeline.
